commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=142c2d29fe4c77dfa04b04ae62d062e012c7b039)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds regression tests for SecretRef auth-profile OAuth preservation and runtime external snapshots, changes media provider registry tests to dynamic imports with module resets, and adds a changelog entry.

PR surface: Tests +221, Docs +1. Total +222 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR blockers: the changelog edit and current-main media test regression are reproducible from the diff and merge-tree result. The linked OAuth deletion report still lacks a high-confidence real provider reproduction in this PR body.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer action rather than automated repair because real behavior proof is missing and the protected maintainer label requires explicit handling.

target.title: test: cover auth profile SecretRef regressions
target.body:
## Summary

- Add regression coverage that SecretRef auth-profile key migration preserves unrelated OAuth profiles, including `oauthRef` and `mode: "oauth"` entries.
- Add regression coverage that runtime-only external OAuth profiles remain in active auth-profile runtime snapshots after `saveAuthProfileStore` while staying out of persisted `auth-profiles.json`.

Refs #86756.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/secrets/apply.test.ts src/agents/auth-profiles/store.runtime-external.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- AWS Crabbox `cbx_b10fdcee52cb`, run `run_101345c1091e`: same focused Vitest command, 3 files passed, 22 tests passed.
- AWS Crabbox `cbx_93580256d97d`, run `run_994b098291ed`: reproduction matrix against `openclaw@2026.5.22` covering generated configure-style plans, provider-target scrub, auth-list follow-up, legacy-ish profile shapes, agent discovery mismatch, and runtime writer probing; no on-disk OAuth deletion reproduced.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Auth-profile SecretRef migration and runtime snapshot preservation for OAuth profiles.
Real environment tested: Local checkout plus direct AWS Crabbox Linux.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/secrets/apply.test.ts src/agents/auth-profiles/store.runtime-external.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`.
Evidence after fix: Local run passed 3 files / 22 tests; AWS Crabbox run `run_101345c1091e` passed 3 files / 22 tests.
Observed result after fix: OAuth profiles are preserved during auth-profile SecretRef migration, and runtime-only external OAuth profiles remain available in active runtime snapshots without being persisted to disk.
What was not tested: Real provider OAuth credentials; the regression coverage uses synthetic credential material and structured runtime snapshots.
target.author: joshavant

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
